name: 3 Cups Jerusalem Artichokes and Padron Pepper

other_details.introduction: This is our seasonal take on a very popular dish in Taiwan named 3 cups chicken (San Bei Ji). It is vegetarian and vegan. But still delicious. We also use Hazelnut oil instead of sesame oil to bind everything together. It could be served as a main or as a vegetable course for people. In the first part you should clean scrub your Jerusalem artichoke.
